spec.precondition: requires valid(alloc) && valid(tensor) && addr.chunk >= 0 && addr.chunk < alloc->n_chunks && valid(alloc->chunks[addr.chunk]) && addr.offset >= 0 && addr.offset < alloc->chunks[addr.chunk]->max_size && alloc->n_chunks <= MAX_CHUNKS && exists i in 0..1024: alloc->allocated_tensors[i].tensor == null(alloc->allocated_tensors[i].tensor)
spec.postcondition: ensures exists i in 0..1024: alloc->allocated_tensors[i].tensor == tensor && alloc->allocated_tensors[i].addr.chunk == addr.chunk && alloc->allocated_tensors[i].addr.offset == addr.offset && forall j in 0..1024: (alloc->allocated_tensors[j].tensor != null(alloc->allocated_tensors[j].tensor)) ==> valid(alloc->allocated_tensors[j].tensor) && alloc->allocated_tensors[j].addr.chunk >= 0 && alloc->allocated_tensors[j].addr.chunk < alloc->n_chunks
